summary: Both REQ-1 (remove yellow border from PDF header) and REQ-2 (increase font sizes throughout PDF) appear to be implemented in frontend/src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts. The file summary explicitly confirms 'yellow left-side accent bar removed from the header, and all font sizes increased by ~2–3pt throughout (section headers, field labels, field values, text areas, technician sub-headers, and footer) while preserving the existing visual hierarchy.' The diff also shows font sizes in the visible truncated portion consistent with increased sizes. No other files were structurally changed beyond the allowed pdfGenerator.ts.
